# Third-party and public-domain assets

## Sticker PNGs (`stickers/`)
Original graphics generated for ScreenCensor (public domain / CC0 dedication by the project).

## Inspiration / adjacent CC0 set
[pixelart-icons](https://github.com/tstamborski/pixelart-icons) by Tomasz Stamborski is released under CC0.
We do not redistribute that archive; sticker artwork in this folder is original.
If a future build vendors selected icons from that set, include its LICENSE beside them.
